Tests for the Math.cos function with various inputs including NaN, strings, zero, infinity, and π.


## Files
- **[15.08.02.07-001.js](15.08.02.07-001.js.md)**: Tests that the cosine of NaN returns NaN using the Math.cos function.
- **[15.08.02.07-002.js](15.08.02.07-002.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of Math.cos with a string input that represents "NaN".
- **[15.08.02.07-003.js](15.08.02.07-003.js.md)**: Tests the Math.cos function with a positive zero input to verify it returns 1.
- **[15.08.02.07-004.js](15.08.02.07-004.js.md)**: Tests the Math.cos function with an input of -0 to verify it returns 1.
- **[15.08.02.07-005.js](15.08.02.07-005.js.md)**: Tests that the cosine of Infinity is NaN using an assertion.
- **[15.08.02.07-006.js](15.08.02.07-006.js.md)**: Tests that the cosine of negative infinity is NaN using the Math.cos function.
- **[15.08.02.07-007.js](15.08.02.07-007.js.md)**: Tests if the cosine of π is equal to -1 using an assertion.
